channel.title: Gadura Real Estate — NYC + Long Island Market Reports
channel.description: Monthly market reports for every neighborhood in Queens, Brooklyn, The Bronx, Manhattan, Staten Island, and Long Island. By Nitin Gadura, NYS Real Estate Salesperson #10401383405.

item.title: Williamsburg Real Estate Market Report — July 2026
item.description: Williamsburg July 2026 market data — median price, days on market, sold-to-list ratio. By Nitin Gadura, Licensed NYS Real Estate Salesperson. Free CMA at (917) 705-0132.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura
